description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-structured-list` (T3-05) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-structured-list/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, selectable prop typed, row/cell data typed, header typed
2. Accessibility — if selectable: radio group pattern with keyboard, otherwise `role="grid"` or table semantics, row selection aria-selected, axe-core pass
3. Tests — basic display, selectable rows, keyboard selection, header alignment, striped variant, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — basic, selectable, with header, striped
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, row hover/selected states, CSS parts (list, row, cell, header)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-structured-list/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-structured-list — T3-05 antagonistic quality review
